title: Brand Harmony Choir 🎶
description: Come sing with us. Split the room, find your part, and play your role - whether that’s rhythm, melody, or something in between. When it all comes together, it’s proof that great ideas - like great brands - sound better in harmony.

title: How AI Is Changing Every Step Between Your Brand and Your Customer
description: Speakers/details: David Hartman · VP of Creative, · Walmart · Cat van der · Werff · Executive Creative Director, · Canva · Bree McKenney · Managing VP Global Creative, · Marriott International · Alastair Cotterill · Head of Creative Lab EMEA, · Spotify. AI is reshaping how brands create, connect, and convert. In this candid discussion, creative leaders share how they're using AI to scale creativity, empower teams, and deliver consistent brand experiences—without losing the human touch.

title: How to ACTUALLY Use AI In Your Marketing
description: Speakers/details: Cat Goetze · Creator & · Founder, · CatGPT · Lexie Barnhorn · Influencer Marketing, · Anthropic · Emma Robinson · Head of B2B Marketing, · Canva. Go beyond talking about AI as CatGPT shows you 5 real use cases — powered by the Canva x Claude integration. This bootcamp-style demo is followed by a beachside chat on scarcity in the age of AI, escaping brand sameness, proving ROI, and the future of creative careers.

title: Where Play Becomes Culture: Building Experiences That Last
description: Speakers/details: Julia Goldin · Chief Marketing Officer, · The LEGO Group · David Tinson · President, Chief Experiences · Officer, Electronic Arts. Explore how leading brands inspire imagination, build passionate communities, and stay relevant across generations—turning engagement into lasting cultural impact in an increasingly connected world.

title: The Power of Brand Building in Entertainment
description: Speakers/details: Amy Reinhard · President, Ads · Netflix · Leandro Barreto · CMO, · Unilever. Discover how iconic global brands are creating powerful fan connections through bold collaborations tied to the world’s most talked-about entertainment moments, cultural events, and fandoms.

title: The People Can Take It From Here
description: Speakers/details: Chris Beresford-Hill · Global Chief Creative Officer, · BBDO · Mark Kirkham · Chief Marketing Officer, US · Beverages, PepsiCo.. Join this deep dive into Pepsi’s risk-taking Super Bowl campaign and learn how leaning into brand competition, cultural conversation, and bold creative helped it break through and capture audience attention.

title: Cracking the Gen Z Code
description: Speakers/details: Leonardo Aizpuru · Chief Marketing Officer, · Nespresso · Fabiola Torres · Global · Chief Marketing · Officer, GAP. An exploration into how leading brands are connecting with Gen Z and what it takes to stay culturally relevant, compelling, and authentic for one of today’s toughest audiences to engage.

title: Read the Room: The ROI of Social Listening
description: Speakers/details: Scott Morris · Chief Marketing Officer, · Sprout Social · Manu Orssaud · Chief Marketing Officer, · Duolingo · Chanelle Kalfas · VP Brand Marketing & · Strategy, The New York Times · Rory Dolan · Head of Marketing Strategy, · Canva · 8pm–9pm. Your audience is already writing your next campaign. The question is whether you're paying attention. This session brings together the marketing leaders behind some of the world's most talked-about brands to explore how social listening has become their most powerful creative tool. Low on battery? Power up on site with

title: Ctrl + Alt + De-Stress
description: Take your ideas from frantic to fantastic with a guided, sound-led reset. This immersive experience uses calming frequencies to help your brain switch off, tune in, and land on a better note.

title: Nicer Tuesdays
description: Speakers/details: Alex Bec · Co-Founder, · It’s Nice That · Cat van der Werff · Executive Creative Director, · Canva · Sebastian Curi · Artist & Illustrator · Cat How · Founder & CEO, · How & How · Janvier Wete · Founder & CEO, · Minute Shorts. Nicer Tuesdays brings together brilliant creative minds from around the world for a morning of bold ideas, behind-the-scenes stories, and unexpected inspiration. Fun, candid, and wildly eclectic, it’s where designers, artists, makers, and creative thinkers come to hear how great work really gets made.

title: Participation is the New Approach to Marketing
description: Speakers/details: Rita Ferro · President, Global Advertising · Disney · Michelle Mesenburg · Chief Brand Officer, · Target. From storytelling and collectibles to immersive experiences, collaborations, and social participation, the discussion will explore how brands build ecosystems that turn passive audiences into active communities.

title: All Pro. No Cons. Introducing Canva's professional tools
description: Speakers/details: Duncan Clark · CEO Pro Design, · Canva. The best creative teams use the best tools—but too often those tools don't work together. Join us for a look at Canva's Professional Suite and see how industry- leading design, motion, data, and AI tools come together in one connected platform, helping teams move faster, stay on brand, and scale great work with less friction.

title: The Dynamic Intersection of Brand & Culture
description: Speakers/details: Taylor Montgomery · Global Chief Brand Officer, · Taco Bell · Todd Kaplan · Chief Marketing Officer, · North America, Kraft Heinz. A closer look at how leading brands are building culture-first connections through social-led media, immersive experiences, and storytelling designed to spark community and broad audience appeal.

title: Scaling the Fan-Verse
description: Speakers/details: Alan Cumming · Actor & Filmmaker · Frances Berwick · Chairman Bravo & Peacock · Unscripted, NBCUniversal. Go behind the scenes of how NBCUniversal turned The Traitors into a cultural phenomenon — driving massive audience engagement through immersive storytelling, fan-first experiences, and seamless cross-platform moments across its media ecosystem.

title: When Personal Brand Meets Brand Building: The Rise of Creator-Led Marketing
description: Speakers/details: Charlotte Collins · Editor -in-Chief, · Sheerluxe · Daniel Adedeji · Founder & CEO, · Atinuda Agency · Lachlan Stewart · Global Social Lead, · Canva · Gina Wolf · Head of Global Creative · Strategy, LinkedIn. Audiences increasingly trust creators, founders and employees over polished brand campaigns. As platforms become culture and entertainment hubs, brands are embracing creator-led strategies to build relevance, reach and connection. This session explores the rise of creator marketing and why the future of brand building is more human than ever.

title: The Sampler: A Conversation About Ideas Without Constraint
description: Speakers/details: Ben Langsfeld · Chief Creative Officer, · Residence · Petra Snellman · VP of Global Creative & · Content, IBM · Duncan Clark · CEO Pro Design, · Canva. Three leaders from brand, creative and tech share strategies they applied from completely different industries and debate whether they'd work in each other's worlds. Three perspectives, one conversation, no script.

title: Doubling Down on AI for Creativity and Personal Connection Find out how global leaders are transforming
description: Speakers/details: Ndidi Oteh · Global Chief Executive Officer, · Accenture Song · Asmita Dubey · Chief Digital & Marketing · Officer, L’Oreal. marketing with a personal touch, where new technologies are enabling custom messaging and experiences for maximum consumer impact.

title: Co-Creating the Future: Breaking Through in the Attention Economy
description: Speakers/details: Gabrielle Dallas Wesley · Chief Marketing Officer NA, · Mars · William White · Chief Marketing Officer, · Walmart. Hear how two beloved brands drive loyalty and engagement in today’s fragmented media landscape. Learn what it takes to stand out when consumers have more choices than ever for how they spend their time.

title: This Show Writes Itself: A Variety Show of AI Experiments and Literal Magic Fresh off SXSW and a profile in
description: Speakers/details: a · y · 10am–4pm. , this traveling show is an anything-can-happen mix of AI experiments, games, and literal magic, driven by the audience in the room. Hosted by Grand Effie award-winning strategist, and America’s Got Talent magician “Magic Mike” Jacobson.

title: Canvarobics in the Sea
description: A playful blend of retro aerobics and synchronized movement, designed to get everyone moving together. Set against a waterside backdrop, it’s a light, energizing reset to spark a more creative rhythm.

title: Inside Canva's Unconventional AI Playbook: Lessons From a Year of Living Dangerously
description: Speakers/details: Cameron Adams · Co-Founder & CPO, · Canva · Bob Safian · Founder, Rapid Response. What does it take to keep scaling when the ground beneath your company is shifting in real time? In this Rapid Response fireside chat, Bob Safian sits down with Canva co- founder and Chief Product Officer Cameron Adams to unpack the most transformative year in Canva’s history, and the choices behind one of the more unexpected AI growth stories of the past 12 months.

title: Who Owns Creativity Now? Cliff Obrecht in Conversation with Michael Barbaro
description: Speakers/details: Cliff Obrecht · Co-Founder & COO, · Canva · Michael Babaro · Host of The Daily, · The New York Times. In a world where AI can generate endless content, the real challenge is creating work that truly resonates. Join Cliff Obrecht and Michael Barbaro as they explore how leading organizations are rethinking creativity end-to- end — and why brand, originality, and strategic reinvention matter more than ever in an AI-first era.

title: Making Moments Matter: At the Intersection of Culture and Commerce
description: Speakers/details: Jill Kramer · Chief Marketing & · Communications Officer, · Mastercard · Marisa Thalberg · Chief Customer & Marketing · Officer, Catalyst Brands. An exploration into how brands are successfully leading with today's culture to meet consumers where they already are, through disruptive campaigns that embrace immersive multiplatform storytelling and live events.

title: Call Kindra: Open Office Hours for Brave Creatives
description: Speakers/details: Kindra Meyer · Executive Creative Director · VERB · Sophie Taylor · Experiential Creative Lead, · Canva. Forget the keynote. This is open office hours for brave creatives. Join AdWeek Creative 100 honoree Kindra Meyer for an interactive session tackling real audience questions—from stalled briefs and difficult clients to bold ideas that won't get approved. Expect candid advice, practical strategies, and the confidence to push your best work further.

title: Put Your Brand to the Test: 4 Ways to Build Beyond the Logo
description: Speakers/details: Tim Hoppin · Global Head of Brand & · Creative, AWS · Rob Giglio · Chief Customer Officer, · Canva. When was the last time your brand got a dedicated sprint? This session makes the case for treating brand as the business asset it is - not just a set of guidelines. Leave with 4 key questions to build beyond the logo.

title: Powered By Fans: Creating Entertainment Brands That Last
description: Speakers/details: Shelley Macintyre · CEO Brands & Licensing, · BBC Studios · Darren Schillace · President Marketing, · FOX Entertainment. As entertainment brands expand across platforms, products, partnerships, and live experiences, the challenge is not just reaching audiences everywhere, but building deeper, lasting connections. Hear how industry leaders are growing fan-driven brands while preserving the qualities that make audiences care in the first place.

title: Creative Couples Therapy: How Great Client-Agency Relationships Keep Big Ideas
description: Speakers/details: Jimmy Knowles · Global Head of Experiential, · Canva · Amanda Brennan · VP of Creative Services, · Public School. Afloat In this candid and comedic session, Canva and Public School explore the realities of successful client-agency partnerships—from creative chemistry and stakeholder feedback to scope creep and protecting bold ideas. With humor and honesty, unpack what it really takes to build ambitious experiential work together.

title: Be Distinctive Everywhere: How KFC is Making Every Experience Finger Lickin’ Good
description: Speakers/details: Christophe Poirier · Chief Concept Officer, · KFC · Peter Aitken · Head of Customer Strategy · & Insights, Kantar · Sam Smith · Executive Business Director, · JKR. Building a truly distinctive brand experience is harder than it sounds. This session gets into what it really means, why it matters, and what it takes to deliver at scale - and what KFC has learned trying to do exactly that.

title: Imagination Is the Defining Advantage of the AI Era
description: Speakers/details: Heather Freeland · Chief Brand Officer, · LinkedIn · Rob Giglio · Chief Customer Officer, · Canva. This session explores what it means to treat imagination as infrastructure. The strategic foundation that makes every other investment work harder. See what's working, right alongside the tools you used to create it.

title: How CMOs Are Rebuilding Legacy Brands For a New Era
description: Speakers/details: Roberto Stanichi · EVP & Chief Global Brand · Officer, Mattel · Claudia Calouri · VP Global Head of Marketing, · Philips. Hear industry leaders discuss why brand transformation requires balancing innovation with trust, where it's critical that brands modernize without losing what made them resonate in the first place.
